titleStmt.title: SII 40.324: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 324. (A.R. No. B. 372 of 1933.) Nallaballi, Jammalamadugu Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab standing near the dhvajastambha of the Hanumān temple.
This is dated Śaka 1469, Plavaṅga, Mārgaśira, ba. [9], corresponding to 1547 A.D., December 5, Monday.

Records the exemption of the grant of the barber-tax of the Karnāṭaka (country) to Koṇḍōju by the king at the instance of Aḷiya Rāmarājayadēva Mahārāja and the remission of the taxes on the barbers of the villages Nallaballe attached to Gaṁḍikōta. Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyāla Timmarājayadēva Mahārāja is stated to have set up this edict.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakhavaruṣaṁbulu
1469 Agunēṭi plavaṁga saṁvatsara mā¨rgaśira ba 9 lu śrīmadrājādhirāja
rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu vija
yanagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanāruḍuḍai pṛthivi sāṁbrājyaṁ cēyucu
nuṁḍagānu śrī¨rmamahāmaṁḍalēsvara naṁdyāla tiṁmarājya
yadēvamahārājulu vrāyiṁcina silāśāsanaṁ sadāsiva
dēvamahārāyala Ānatini Āḷiyarāmarājayadēvamahārā
jula mudalanu ka¨rnaṭakānaku cellē maṁgaḷapaṁnnu koṁḍōju
ku sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu maṁniṁcināru gaṁḍikōṭaku cellē grā
maṁ nallaballi maṁggaḷavāri paṁnnu sidāyaṁ kāṇike kāvili
veṭi doṁmaripaṁnnusahā sa¨rvamānyaṁgānu maṁnistimi yi dha
¨rmanaku yavaru tappinavāruṁnnu kukkamāṁsaṁ surasēviṁ
cinavāru tallikiṁnni cellekiṁnni tappina pātakana pōduru
Digital edition of SII 40.324 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
